## Type of change

## Checklist

- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention) (`fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`, etc.)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for any changed logic
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] I have **not** modified `harness/scorers.py`, `harness/judge.py`, `schema/eval_item.schema.json`, or `data/` without explicit maintainer approval (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md#what-not-to-touch))
- [ ] No evaluation item contents, gold answers, or held-out split data are included
